string-array.name: sports_titles
string-array.item: Baseball
Badminton
Basketball
Bowling
Cycling
Golf
Running
Soccer
Swimming
Table Tennis
Tennis

string-array.name: sports_info
string-array.item: Baseball is a bat-and-ball game played between two teams.
Badminton is a racquet sport played using racquets to hit a shuttlecock.
Basketball is a team sport where two teams try to score by shooting a ball through a hoop.
Bowling is a target sport and recreational activity.
Cycling is a popular form of transport, recreation, and sport.
Golf is a club-and-ball sport in which players hit balls into a series of holes.
Running is a method of terrestrial locomotion allowing humans to move rapidly on foot.
Soccer is a team sport played between two teams of eleven players with a spherical ball.
Swimming is an individual or team racing sport that requires the use of one\'s entire body.
Table tennis is a sport in which two or four players hit a lightweight ball back and forth.
Tennis is a racket sport that can be played individually against a single opponent or between two teams.
